name: Betamax
description: VCR-inspired HTTP recorder for python-requests that stores interactions in reusable cassettes for reproducible integration tests.

seo.title: Betamax — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Betamax: VCR-inspired HTTP recorder for python-requests that stores interactions in reusable cassettes for reproducible integration tests.

when_to_use: Record HTTP cassettes for deterministic integration tests
Offline test runs replaying real API responses
Speed up Python test suites by eliminating live network calls
Prevent flaky tests caused by external API changes

pros: Deterministic HTTP tests without hitting real APIs
Cassettes are plain files, easy to inspect and commit
cons: Project development is largely quiet these days
Only works with requests, not httpx or aiohttp
Cassettes drift when upstream APIs change silently
Secrets in cassettes need careful scrubbing
review.verdict: Solid VCR-style recorder if you are on python-requests, but check maintenance before betting on it.
review.best_for: Python projects pinned to requests that need reproducible integration tests
review.not_for: Async-first stacks on httpx/aiohttp or teams wanting actively maintained tooling
